sections.title: Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19) — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19) — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19) is an essential building block of spoken and written English. Formula: Mixed revision of Want, Wanted, Let, Let's, Would Like To, Can, Should, May, Must. Rules: Want/Wants for present desire, Wanted for past desire | Let + person + base verb for permission; Let's for suggestions including yourself | Would like to is the polite version of want to | Can = ability/permission, Should = advice, May = possibility/formal permission, Must = strong obligation
sections.formula: Mixed revision of Want, Wanted, Let, Let's, Would Like To, Can, Should, May, Must

examples.english: I would like to meet you.

sections.title: Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19) — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19) — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Here are everyday sentences using Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19) that you will use in daily conversation, at home, and with friends.
sections.formula: Mixed revision of Want, Wanted, Let, Let's, Would Like To, Can, Should, May, Must

examples.hindi: क्या मैं अंदर आ सकता हूँ?
हमें नियमों का पालन करना चाहिए।
वह एक नई नौकरी चाहता है।
वह एक नई कार चाहता था।

sections.title: Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19) — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19) — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19) in professional and office contexts so you can use it confidently at work.
sections.formula: Mixed revision of Want, Wanted, Let, Let's, Would Like To, Can, Should, May, Must

examples.english: We would like to have a coffee.

sections.title: Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19) — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19) — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: Learn how to make negative sentences and questions using Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19). Common mistakes: forgetting to keep the base verb form, or wrong subject agreement.
sections.formula: Mixed revision of Want, Wanted, Let, Let's, Would Like To, Can, Should, May, Must
